productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Green White Blue Checked Shirt
description: Composition100% cotton shirt with half sleeves, has checks in green, white, and blue, white stitch detailing, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, buttoned patch pockets on both chest with white thread detailing, full length buttoned placket and curved hemline, appliqued logo and embroidered lettering on left chestFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this checked shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
